name: inktui
description: Ink (React-for-terminal) rewrite of the murder TUI; consumes the service over the Unix-socket JSON-RPC bus.

scripts.bundle: esbuild src/index.tsx --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --target=node20 --outfile=dist/bundle/index.js --alias:react-devtools-core=./stubs/react-devtools-core.js --banner:js="import { createRequire as __cr } from 'node:module'; const require = __cr(import.meta.url);"
